languages.text: "Значит, нам следует уважить их служение Ему и принять их подозрительность как данность. Я передам солдатам, Ваша Светлость. Больше от нас не будет проблем".
"Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."
languages.original_text: "Значит, нам следует уважить их служение Ему и принять их подозрительность как данность. Я передам солдатам, Ваша Светлость. Больше от нас не будет проблем".

traits.locale_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."
"Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."
"So I should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicious looks as the diligence of the righteous."
"Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."
"Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

languages.text: 「だから、彼らが神に仕えることに敬意を払い、彼らが持つ疑いの目を、義人の勤勉さとして受け入れるべきだ」
languages.original_text: "So I should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicious looks as the diligence of the righteous."

languages.text: "Öyleyse onların O'na olan hizmetlerini onurlandırmalı ve şüphelerini olağan karşılamalıyız. Askerlere söyleyeceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Artık sorun çıkarmayacağız."
languages.original_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Öyleyse onların O'na olan hizmetlerini onurlandırmalı ve şüphelerini olağan karşılamalıyız. Askerlere söyleyeceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Artık sorun çıkarmayacağız."

languages.text: “那我们就该尊重他们对神皇的侍奉，并将他们的怀疑视为理所当然。我会告知士兵，大人。我们不会再惹麻烦了。”
languages.original_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

traits.locale_text: “那我们就该尊重他们对神皇的侍奉，并将他们的怀疑视为理所当然。我会告知士兵，大人。我们不会再惹麻烦了。”

languages.text: "Dann sollten wir ihren Dienst für Ihn ehren und ihr Misstrauen als gegeben akzeptieren. Ich werde es den Soldaten sagen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir werden keinen Ärger mehr machen."
languages.original_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Dann sollten wir ihren Dienst für Ihn ehren und ihr Misstrauen als gegeben akzeptieren. Ich werde es den Soldaten sagen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir werden keinen Ärger mehr machen."

languages.text: « Nous devons rendre honneur au service qu'ils Lui rendent et accepter leurs regards méfiants. Je le dirai aux soldats, Votre Seigneurie. Nous ne vous causerons plus d'ennuis. »
languages.original_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

traits.locale_text: « Nous devons rendre honneur au service qu'ils Lui rendent et accepter leurs regards méfiants. Je le dirai aux soldats, Votre Seigneurie. Nous ne vous causerons plus d'ennuis. »

languages.text: «Entonces debemos honrar su servicio al Dios Emperador y aceptar su recelo como un hecho. Informaré a los soldados, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No causaremos más problemas».
languages.original_text: "Then we should honour their service to Him and accept their suspicion as a given. I'll tell the soldiers, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll cause no more trouble."

traits.locale_text: «Entonces debemos honrar su servicio al Dios Emperador y aceptar su recelo como un hecho. Informaré a los soldados, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No causaremos más problemas».
